calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Corey for Emma Parker (Petitioner).

Mr. Corey stated that he tried to submit page 6 (missing page) of the will yesterday but was unable to do so because the will file was not available to the filing Clerk. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order and subject to a copy of the will being filed).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Y. Watts. (Not Reported)
